problemsSolutions.title: Do any of these sound familiar?

noCureNoPay.title: You only pay when it works

proposition.heading: No risk. No upfront investment. Just results.
proposition.point2: You define the success criteria together with us
proposition.point3: Pay only after verified, measurable results

story.heading: Our story
story.paragraph1: AIntern was founded with one mission: give every SME their own dedicated AI intern — one that knows your business, runs your internal processes, and works like an extra employee without the overhead.
story.paragraph2: We develop your AI intern from scratch: analysing your processes, identifying where AI adds real value, and building a solution that fits exactly how you work. You only pay when results are verified.

vision.heading: Our vision
vision.text: Every SME deserves their own AI intern — built to know your business, not anyone else's.

contact.heading: Ready to start?
contact.subtext: Book a free intro call. We'll analyse your situation and show you exactly what your AI intern can do.
